status_evidence: 147173e17ea741687247 SAMRIDH SAMRIDH SCHEME Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) MeitY Startup Hub (MSH), Digital India Corporation MeitY Startup Hub (MSH) CURRENT_SCHEME_INFORMATION_AVAILABLE APPLICATION_STATUS_REQUIRES_VERIFICATION Support existing and upcoming accelerators to select and accelerate promising product-based and IT-based startups, helping them scale through customer connections, investor connections, product enhancement and international-market access. Direct scheme partners are existing or upcoming accelerators operating in India. The scheme document requires relevant incubation or accelerator experience, startup-support track record, suitable infrastructure, mentor and investor networks, and capability to run structured cohorts. Startups participate as downstream beneficiaries through accelerators selected under cohort-specific calls. Eligible accelerators as direct scheme partners and selected product-based or IT-based startups as downstream beneficiaries.
